calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cameron Miller for the Petitioner.

The Court admitted the will and granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli/J. Gomez.
